problem id: 72ffb208
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND SHR(3)

examples:
  00100010 -> 00000100
  00101110 -> 00000100
  10000111 -> 00000000
  11001010 -> 00010001
  00000110 -> 00000000
  00001000 -> 00000000
  00011101 -> 00000010
  01100010 -> 00000100
  11000110 -> 00001000

query: 01011100
predicted answer: 00001000
